class.name: mdrobot_ros2_control/MdrobotSystemHardware
class.description: ros2_control SystemInterface for MDROBOT MD-series motor controllers (RS485 / Modbus RTU). device_type=single -> 1 joint (one controller); dual -> 2 joints (one two-channel controller); twin -> 2 joints driven as TWO single-channel controllers at distinct Modbus slave IDs on one bus (per-joint motor_id), e.g. two MD400 for a skid-steer base.
